description: A vendor calls to inquire about an unpaid invoice. The system shows the invoice is on hold due to a price discrepancy.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the invoice status for the vendor.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the invoice is on hold and finds the reason code is 'Price Mismatch'.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the details of the mismatch, showing the invoice price is higher than the purchase order price.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the PO price was $10/unit, but the invoice price was $11/unit.

nodes.task_description: Inform the vendor of the specific discrepancy and request they submit a corrected invoice or a credit memo for the difference.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the issue and the required action to the vendor.
